name: RTD Financial
description_short: RTD Financial is a wealth management firm offering personalized financial advisory services for individuals, families, businesses, and nonprofits through a relationship-first approach.
description_long:
RTD Financial is a nationally recognized wealth management firm that positions itself as a relationship-driven financial advisory company. The firm emphasizes personal attention and customized financial planning rather than one-size-fits-all solutions. According to their website, the company operates on the principle that effective financial management requires deep understanding of each client's unique goals, aspirations, and challenges before advice can be given.

RTD Financial offers four primary service lines: Personal Wealth Management for families and individuals, Employer Retirement Plan Solutions for business owners and executives, Trust Investment Management for individual and corporate trustees, and Nonprofit Investment Management for nonprofit boards and finance committees. Each service is framed around personalized planning and relationship-based advisory work rather than transactional financial products.

The firm distinguishes itself through its emphasis on listening, personal relationships, and customized service delivery. They explicitly state they have "no off-the-shelf solutions" and highlight that clients work with a dedicated team of three RTD experts directly, supported by approximately thirty additional professionals. Their brand identity centers on the philosophy "Expert Advisors, But People First" and "We see more than numbers. We see you."

RTD Financial is positioned as a premium wealth management advisory firm targeting affluent individuals, families with significant assets, business owners, institutional clients, and nonprofit organizations. The current CreditDoc categorization as "free-help" appears to be an error, as the company provides fee-based wealth management services, not free financial counseling or nonprofit credit advice.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Dedicated team model with three direct advisors per client plus thirty support professionals available
Explicitly customized service approach with no off-the-shelf solutions
Nationally recognized firm with established track record in wealth management
Multiple service lines addressing different client needs: personal wealth, retirement plans, trusts, and nonprofits
Emphasis on relationship-based advisory that prioritizes understanding client goals and aspirations
Established online presence with regular news and insights content published
Professional team structure combining financial expertise with business leadership experience
cons: Website provides limited specific information about fee structures, minimum account sizes, or investment minimums
No transparent disclosure of advisor credentials, certifications, or regulatory registrations visible on homepage
Minimal detail about investment philosophy, strategies, or performance benchmarks
No information about whether they are fee-only, fee-based, or commission-based advisors
Limited transparency about specific services depth or whether they offer tax planning, estate planning, or insurance services beyond wealth management
best_for: Affluent individuals and families seeking personalized wealth management with dedicated advisory relationships
Business owners and executives designing or managing employer retirement plans
Corporate and individual trustees requiring professional investment management for trusts
Nonprofit organizations and boards developing comprehensive investment strategies
diagnosis: RTD Financial is best suited for affluent individuals, families with significant assets, business owners, and institutional clients seeking personalized wealth management advisory services with dedicated relationship teams. The primary caveat is that this is a premium advisory firm with undisclosed minimums and fees—not a consumer lending or credit counseling service—and the current "free-help" categorization is inaccurate.
services: Personal Wealth Management for families and individuals
Employer Retirement Plan Solutions for businesses
Retirement program design and management services
Trust Investment Management for individual trustees
Trust Investment Management for corporate trustees
Nonprofit Investment Management for boards and finance committees
High-impact investment plan development and maintenance
Financial planning focused on unique client needs
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: RTD Financial offers personalized financial advisory services for individuals, families, businesses, and nonprofits.
